name: Unity Software Inc.
description: Unity Software Inc. is a leading American technology company that provides a comprehensive platform for creating, operating, and monetizing interactive, real-time 2D and 3D content. Widely recognized for its powerful game engine, Unity enables developers to build and deploy immersive experiences across a vast array of platforms, including mobile devices, PCs, gaming consoles, and augmented or virtual reality hardware. Beyond game development, the company offers a suite of integrated tools for advertising, analytics, and multiplayer services, empowering creators and businesses to bring their digital visions to life and engage audiences globally.
